ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the brand */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the brand */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the brand belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the brand belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the category (0 = top-level, 1 = sub-category, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which product should be reordered */,
  "last_restocked" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last restocked */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse storing the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_description" TEXT /* Description of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_description" TEXT /* Description of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of ordering */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order item (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount to be applied */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "code" TEXT /* Discount code for the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the product has received */,
  "sales" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue generated by the product */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate of the product (e.g., sales/views) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
